title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Bharat Heavy Electricals

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Bharat Heavy Electricals
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals!
